ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Closed No-Bid for Core services.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
NOT( OR(RecordType.Name = "Optum Sales Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Consulting Services Sales", RecordType.Name = "Primary Care Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "Patient Engagement Opportunity", RecordType.Name = "SNF - Skilled Nursing Facility", RecordType.Name = "AL - Assisted Living Facility", RecordType.Name = "eMAC Sales Opportunity")) &&
ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Closed-No Bid")&&
(ISNULL(CloseDate)|| ISNULL(Lost_Date__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Required Fields: Lost Date and Close Date.
